business.name: North Alabama Tree Service
business.tagline: Trees cut, stumps gone, yard clean

hero.headline: The tree guy *even the bees trust*
hero.subheadline: JD and crew show up when they say they will — and clean up like they were never here.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every tree, every stump, every cleanup
services_section.subheading: From takedowns to firewood, we handle it all

services.title: Tree Removal
services.description: Safe takedowns of any size tree. We work around power lines, houses, and anything you want to keep.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Stumps ground below grade so you can plant, build, or mow right over them.

services.title: Storm Cleanup
services.description: When the weather hits, we clear your property fast. Emergency calls get priority.

services.title: Firewood Sales
services.description: Seasoned hardwood ready to burn. Multiple wood types available — you load, cash or Venmo.

about.heading: JD and the crew
about.body: We're the Huntsville tree team that saves bees, builds bird baths, and cleans up like we were never there. Real people answering the phone.

reviews.name: Marshall D.
reviews.text: Needed firewood and NATS came through. Variety of wood to choose from, helpful staff, easy in and out. Had a wonderful fire that evening.

reviews.name: Steve D.
reviews.text: JD removed two trees and even saved the bees. Asked him not to cut one to the ground for a bird bath — he was all on-board. If you ask JD something, he obliges.

reviews.name: Terry W.
reviews.text: Completely satisfied with North Alabama Tree Service. JD and crew were professional, exceeded expectations, and did great cleanup work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving North Alabama
service_areas.subheading: Tree service throughout the Tennessee Valley

cta.heading: Ready to get those trees handled?
cta.body: Call JD for a quote. He'll come out same day and give you straight pricing on the spot.
